banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock licence holder: Hemi Walker, renewing a full Class 1 (car) driver licence, using the fast identity pathway (a current NZ passport), no name change, no medical condition affecting driving, and not turning 75 at this renewal. All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real licence holder's information.

attestation.statement: I declare that, to the best of my knowledge and belief, my licence is not currently suspended or revoked, and/or that I am not disqualified from obtaining or holding a driver licence. I declare that, to the best of my knowledge and belief, all the information I have given for this application is correct. I declare that the medical fitness information provided above is true and accurate.

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (nz/nzta/drivers-licence-renewal). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to NZ Transport Agency Waka Kotahi, any driver licensing agent, or any government system. A human (the licence holder) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and take the completed form and original documents in person to a driver licensing agent before this renewal is submitted. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
